body_txt: Power reverbs. The more power, the more echo. So when a magical person such as a witch, wizard or some other type of spellcaster is reciting the lines of a curse/spell, or when a seemingly omnipotent being makes itself known, their voices suddenly becoming booming and echo-y is practically a given. Same thing goes for when fighters, even the most mortal , are announcing their attacks . The phenomenon could be attributed to the character's supernatural qualities, but let's face it, echoes just make recitations cooler . When a character speaks, not with an echo, but with multiple voices simultaneously, that's Voice of the Legion . See also: Power Glows , Power Floats , Power Makes Your Voice Deep .
